chunks.content:
DECISION TREE ESTIMATION OF TOXIC RISK

NAME: J. D. Ergle and R. F. Dufresne                 DATE: August 14, 1990

COMPOUND NAME  
Vanitrope

STRUCTURE  
(chemical structure diagram shown: an aromatic ring with substituents labeled “CH3CH2O” and “OH”, and a side chain extending from the ring)

ESTIMATED TOXICITY CLASS: III                 LORILLARD COMPOUND CODE NUMBER: B134

COMMENTS  
This ethoxy substituted aromatic falls into class III.

(signatures)  
J. D. Ergle  
Research Chemist

R. F. Dufresne  
Research Chemist

LORILLARD RESEARCH CENTER

FORM 1 (5-90)

(vertical number along right edge) 8708028  
(vertical number near right edge) 2093073
